executives.name: Alan Krusi
executives.background: Independent Director. Former executive at AECOM and Realogy Holdings Corp.

executives.name: Gaurav Kapoor
executives.background: Gaurav Kapoor is the Chief Financial Officer of AECOM. He previously served as Chief Accounting Officer and Global Controller. Before joining AECOM in 2016, he held various senior financial roles at Ernst & Young.

executives.name: Pablo Mercado
executives.background: Mr. Mercado has over 20 years of experience in finance and corporate development in the energy industry. He previously served as CFO of EnLink Midstream, LLC and held senior roles at ConocoPhillips.
